title: Senior Software Engineer II Applied AI and Evaluations

summary.lv: Senior programmatūras inženieris II (Applied AI un Evaluations) uzņēmumā Smartsheet, veidojot un novērtējot AI darba pārvaldības funkcijas.
summary.en: Senior Software Engineer II (Applied AI & Evaluations) at Smartsheet, building and evaluating AI-powered work-management features.
